---
name: Bug Report
about: Something not working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**What did you expect?**
What should have happened instead.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Team size / formation**
e.g. 7v7, 2-3-1

**Device**
e.g. iPhone 14, Chrome on Android
